words.def: a wide scarf worn about their shoulders by women
words.zh: n. 女用披肩, 聖衣

words.def: people who are destined to die soon
words.zh: a. 失去的, 遺失的, 迷惑的

words.def: a brutal terrorist group active in Kashmir; fights against India with the goal of restoring Islamic rule of India
words.zh: vt. 讓, 假設, 出租, 排放, 妨礙

words.def: (often followed by `of') a large number or amount or extent
words.zh: n. 運氣, 籤, 抽籤, 份額, 許多, 一堆

words.def: a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used
words.zh: n. 日落, 同夥, 組合, 集合, 裝置
